reviews.review_description: Very helpful app, it is relaxing and easy to use. Love the puzzle games, quiet space and the educational videos are great.

I’ve tried reaching out to them to no avail. There’s an unfortunate barrier to entry that is exacerbated by the lack of communication. There needs to be a clear  and consistent approach to communication for a mental health app/company.

developer_response.body: Very sorry to hear this, it may have got stuck in a filter. Please get in touch again via hello@shine-vr.com and we can progress.
